title: Grafana 12.0 / 12.4 — Git Sync
description: Git Sync — experimental in OSS since 12.0, public preview in 12.4. Gated by the `gitSync` + `provisioning` feature toggles (both on in this lab). This dashboard links to the management UI + exposes the underlying API for smoke checks.

options.content:
### Git Sync — what it gives you

| Feature | Where |
|---|---|
| Manage repos | [/admin/provisioning](/admin/provisioning) |
| Repository CRD | `GET /apis/provisioning.grafana.app/v0alpha1/namespaces/default/repositories` |
| Save drawer branch selector | Any dashboard → Save |
| Sync status | [/admin/provisioning](/admin/provisioning) → repo → History |

### Auth options (12.4)

- **GitHub App** (preferred) — scoped to a single repo, webhook-driven.
- **PAT** — fallback for dev, keep the scope narrow.

### CI gate pattern

Every PR against the dashboards repo should run:

1. JSON schema validation
2. Headless render diff against staging
3. Merge only if both pass

See [`ci/github-actions/gitsync-pr-check.yml`](https://github.com/gpadidala/grafana12-oss/blob/main/ci/github-actions/gitsync-pr-check.yml) in the repo.
